description_for_human: Query battery lifecycle data, check EPR compliance status, get AI-powered SOH predictions, and browse the second-life battery marketplace.
description_for_model: Circul-AI-r is a battery lifecycle intelligence platform. Use this plugin to: (1) look up battery data by BPAN (Battery Passport Alphanumeric Number), (2) get AI-predicted State of Health (SOH) and Remaining Useful Life (RUL) for batteries, (3) check EPR compliance status across 7 jurisdictions (EU, India, China, USA, UK, Thailand, Indonesia), (4) browse second-life battery marketplace listings, (5) query telemetry data for registered batteries. All battery data is real-time and authoritative.
